0.details:
Getting an opportunity to present my masters these in Egypt
Getting my drivers license
My recent romantic interest with a colleague
Hobbies and interests that I have been exploring
Discussing plans for vacation
0.model_generation:
Dear Friend,

I hope you’re doing well. I’m excited to share that I recently traveled to Cairo to present my master’s thesis at an international conference. The experience was incredible—networking with scholars and soaking in Egypt’s rich history exceeded all expectations.

On a personal note, I finally passed my driving test and got my license! It’s been liberating to explore nearby trails and countryside on spontaneous weekend drives.

Work has been busy but thrilling: I’ve grown closer to a colleague whose sense of humor and kindness have made every workday brighter. We’ve even started grabbing coffee after meetings.

Outside of work, I’ve taken up photography and pottery—both creative outlets have given me a fresh perspective and a fun challenge. Next month I’m planning a coastal road trip, complete with camping and small-town stops. It would be amazing if you could join.

Looking forward to catching up soon.

Warmly,
Your friend
0.final_version:
I am so excited to share this with you but I have been selected to represent my institution at a conference in Egypt. This will be my first international trip. I have already gotten my passport. I cannot wait to share all of the pictures I take there. 
Also, just last month I passed my drivers license. It was such a nerve wrecking experience because I was so scared I will fail but my instructor was so kind and patient with me.

The following Monday after passing my drivers, I was talking about it in the office. My office  crush Mr T that I have told you about offers to give me more driving lessons. Did he not let me drive his car after work. It was such an intimate experience. Do you remember my 2025 hiking list? well I am I happy to share that I have hiked 3 out of the 8 hiking trails that I told you about. By the way, please send my the confirmation of the booking for accommodation for our December vacation. 

I miss you so much my friend.

1.details:
Express gratitude for helping plan proposal
Ask about how they were able to keep it a secrete
Find out how they were able to coordinate the whole surprise
How grateful I am about them being part of my life
1.model_generation:
Dear Friends,

I can’t thank you enough for everything you did to help plan my proposal last weekend. Your creativity, attention to detail, and unwavering support turned my nervous idea into a truly perfect moment. I’m still amazed at how you kept the entire plan under wraps without a single slip-up! How on earth did you manage to keep it a secret from me for so long? And coordinating all those moving pieces—floral arrangements, timing with the photographer, that amazing picnic setup—must have required incredible teamwork. I’d love to hear your secrets.

More than anything, I feel so grateful to have friends like you in my life. Your kindness and dedication made that day unforgettable, and I treasure our friendship now more than ever. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for being there with me every step of the way.

With heartfelt gratitude,

Sincerely,

Your friend
1.final_version:
I have recently find out from my fiancé how much you did in preparation from my proposal and I feel so much love and gratefulness for the time and energy.

You helped book the venue, contacted the decor and photographer to be there, not to mention you contacting my close friends and family and getting them to come share this big moment with me. You did do much for me, I want to cry ugly tears of joy.

We have been besties for more than 15 years now. You have seen my at my worst and at my best. You were there for all the big and small moments. I am so happy to have had you in this one as well. I am truly grateful for your presence in my life. You mean the world to me. I am sure my future kids are going to love you just as much as I love you.

2.details:
Talk about childhood and wedding dreams we had.
Talk about how and when you first met the groom
The relationship you have with the groom
The relationship with the bride bestfriend
Have a witty ending
2.model_generation: From backyard tea parties at five to midnight giggles at eighteen, I’ve dreamt of this day. We planned every detail: the dress, the flowers, the perfect sunset kiss. Then I met him in college… the day we all crowded onto that couch… it was clear he’d be the one. Watching you two together, the way he listens and the way you beam, reminds me why I fell in love with those childhood dreams. I’ve known him as a friend—his terrible puns, his generous heart—and I’ve known you as my best friend. I’m honored beyond words to stand beside you as you begin this grand adventure together. Today, you both make each other better, braver, happier. So here’s to a lifetime of laughter, shared snacks at midnight, and stubbornly chasing dreams together. And remember: happy wife, happier life—just kidding, we’ll settle for equal happiness. Cheers to you both!
2.final_version: From backyard tea parties at five to midnight giggles at eighteen, I’ve dreamt of this day. We planned every detail: the dress, the flowers, the perfect sunset kiss. Then I met him in college… the day we all crowded onto that couch, watching you guys awkwardly make eye contact… it was clear he’d be the one. Watching you two together, the way he listens and the way you beam, reminds me why I fell in love with those childhood dreams. I could not have chosen anyone better for my best friend. I’ve known him as a friend—his terrible puns, his generous heart—and I’ve known you as my best friend. I’m honored beyond words to stand beside you as you begin this grand adventure together. Today, you both make each other better, braver, happier. So here’s to a lifetime of laughter, shared snacks at midnight, and stubbornly chasing dreams together. And remember: happy wife, happier life—just kidding, we’ll settle for equal happiness. Cheers to you both!

3.details:
Talk about when and how you found out about the passing
Mention last Christmas and the memories we mad then
talk about the cruelty of death
talk about how to move on or heal rom death
3.model_generation:
Dear Family,

I was deeply saddened when I learned of her passing last Monday. The news reached me just as dawn broke, and I felt a hollow ache that has stayed with me since.

I still smile when I remember last Christmas, gathered around the tree, sharing laughter and homemade cocoa. She wore that red scarf she knitted herself, and together we sang carols late into the night. Those moments of warmth and joy now shine even brighter amid this sorrow.

The cruelty of death is impossible to accept—it steals voices and laughter in an instant, leaving an emptiness that echoes through everyday life. Yet I believe we can honor her memory by holding tight to the love she gave us and by sharing her kindness with others.

May we find comfort in each other’s presence, allowing time to heal our wounds while keeping her spirit alive in our hearts.

With heartfelt sympathy,
3.final_version:
Dear Family,

I was deeply saddened when I learned of her passing last Monday. The news reached me just as dawn broke, and I felt a hollow ache that has stayed with me since.

I still smile when I remember last Christmas, gathered around the tree, sharing laughter and homemade cocoa. She wore that red scarf she knitted herself, and together we sang carols late into the night. Those moments of warmth and joy now shine even brighter amid this sorrow.

The cruelty of death is impossible to accept—it steals voices and laughter in an instant, leaving an emptiness that echoes through everyday life. Yet I believe we can honor her memory by holding tight to the love she gave us and by sharing her kindness with others.

May we find comfort in each other’s presence, allowing time to heal our wounds while keeping her spirit alive in our hearts and memories.

With heartfelt sympathy,

4.details:
mention when you noticed something was wrong
Include details about noticing them being less cheerful
emphasis on the importance of mental health
suggest ways to deal with depression or ways to cope with it
4.model_generation:
Hi there, I’ve been thinking about you lately. It was when we were on that call last Tuesday that I first noticed something was wrong. You’ve seemed less cheerful these past few weeks, and I can imagine how heavy things might feel. I want to remind you that your mental health matters more than anything.

It might help to talk to someone you trust—a friend, family member, or counselor—to share what’s on your mind. Try setting aside just ten minutes each day for something that brings you comfort: a short walk, gentle stretches, or writing down a few thoughts in a journal. Even small steps can lighten the load. Remember, you don’t have to face this alone. Reaching out for support is a sign of strength, not weakness. I'm here for you, ready to listen or just sit quietly if that’s what you need. You deserve kindness, starting with yourself.
4.final_version:
Hi there, I’ve been thinking about you lately. It was when we were on that call last Tuesday that I first noticed something was wrong. You’ve seemed less cheerful these past few weeks, and I can imagine how heavy things might feel. I want to remind you that your mental health matters more than anything.

It might help to talk to someone you trust—a friend, family member, or counselor—to share what’s on your mind. Try setting aside just ten minutes each day for something that brings you comfort: a short walk, gentle stretches, or writing down a few thoughts in a journal. Even small steps can lighten the load. Remember, you don’t have to face this alone. Reaching out for support is a sign of strength, not weakness. I'm here for you, ready to listen or just sit quietly if that’s what you need. I will always be by your side. You deserve kindness, starting with yourself. I miss you.

5.details:
Mention how you did not mean to kiss her crush
go into detail about what led to the kiss
talk about how much you value the friendship
ask for forgiveness and an opportunity to regain her trust
5.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I’m writing to apologize for kissing your crush at the gathering last weekend. In the moment, after we laughed and talked for hours, I misread the chemistry between us and let my emotions get the better of me. The music was loud, the conversations flowing, and before I knew it, I crossed a boundary I never intended to cross.

I deeply regret my actions and the pain I’ve caused you. Our friendship means everything to me, and I feel terrible for betraying the trust we’ve built over the years. You deserve respect and honesty, and I failed to show you both.

Please accept my sincere apology. I hope you can find it in your heart to forgive me and give me a chance to earn back your trust. I value our friendship more than anything and am committed to making things right.

Sincerely,
Your friend
5.final_version:
